Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
The Laws of Zambia
INTERNATIONAL GAME PARK AND WILDLIFE 27 of 1971
Statutory Instrument
191 of 1973
An Act to provide for the establishment of the International Game Park; save where 37 of 1983
it is expressly provided to the contrary in this Act, to apply the provisions of
the National Parks and Wildlife Act thereto; to provide for transfer or
assignment of all or any of the powers, duties or functions conferred or
imposed upon the Minister and the Director under the said Act; to provide for
the appointment of wildlife officers and wildlife rangers; to provide for the
establishment, composition, functions and duties of an Advisory Committee in
place of the National Parks Board; and to provide for matters connected with
or incidental to the foregoing.
[15th, August, 1973]

sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the International Game Park and Wildlife Act. Short title
In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires- Interpretation
Notwithstanding the provisions of the Act, the President may, by statutory order, Establishment of
sections.text:
declare any one or more of the areas of land within the Republic and mentioned in the International Game
Schedule to be a National Park, thereafter to be known as the International Game Park, Park
and may, in like manner, define, alter or extend its limits.

sections.heading: Subject to the provisions of this Act, the provisions of the Act and the rules, Application of the 1968
sections.text:
regulations and orders made thereunder shall apply, mutatis mutandis, to the International Act
Game Park as they apply to any other National Park within the Republic.

sections.heading: Notwithstanding anything to the contrary contained in the Act, or in any other Transfer or
sections.text:
written law, and subject to the provisions of subsection (2), the Minister may, by statutory assignment of powers,
instrument, for the specified period transfer or assign to the lessee- duties or functions by
the Minister.
(a) all or any of the powers, duties or functions conferred or imposed upon him Cap. 201
by the Act;
(b) all or any the powers, duties or functions conferred or imposed upon the
Directors of Wildlife, Fisheries and National Parks by the Act.
Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
The Laws of Zambia
(2) The powers, duties or functions which are transferred or assigned under
paragraph (a) or (b) of subsection (1) shall be exercised only for the purposes of
administering the International Game Park, carrying out the provisions of the Act and of
this Act, but for no other purpose.

sections.heading: For the purposes of this Act, the lessee shall have the power to engage Power to appoint
sections.text:
during the specified period wildlife officers and wildlife rangers who shall, to all intents and wildlife officers and
purposes, be the servants or agents of the lessee. wildlife rangers
(2) The wildlife officers and wildlife rangers engaged pursuant to subsection (1) shall Cap. 201
exercise such functions and perform such duties as are conferred upon wildlife officers
and honorary wildlife rangers under the provisions of the Act, or as are delegated or
assigned to them by the lessee.

sections.heading: For the purposes of this Act, there shall be established during the specified Establishment of
sections.text:
period an Advisory Committee in place of the National Parks Board mentioned in section Advisory Committee.
eleven of the Act. Cap. 201

sections.text: subject to the prior written approval of the Minister. Advisory Committee

sections.heading: The Advisory Committee shall, in respect of the International Game Park, Functions and duties
sections.text:
exercise such functions and perform such duties as are conferred upon the National Parks of Advisory

SCHEDULE
(Section 3)
AREAS OF LAND
Blue Lagoon, Lunga-Luswishi, Mweru Marsh National Park, Lusenga, Lavushi-Manda, Sichifula,
Mumbwa East, Lukusuzi, Luano Liuwa Plain and Isangano.
(As amended by S.I. No. 37 of 1983)
